mnemonics: Fork for new process, Vfork for forking same
Exit code: Exit(0) - Successful, Exit(1-127) - Error
keyPoints: Process Control: fork() - creates a new process
Process Control: vfork() - forking same process
Process Control: exit() - terminates the process
Process Control: wait() - pauses execution until child terminates
Process Control: waitpid() - wait for process with specific PID
Process Control: wait3() - wait for process with specific PID, with 3rd argument to specify signal to send
